game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept:
UNDERTALE! The RPG game where you don't have to destroy anyone. Welcome to UNDERTALE. In this RPG, you control a human who falls underground into the world of monsters. Now you must find your way out... or stay trapped forever.

((Healthy Dog's Warning: Game contains imagery that may be harmful to players with photosensitive epilepsy or similar condition.))

features:


  • Killing is unnecessary: negotiate out of danger using the unique battle system.
  • Time your attacks for extra damage, then dodge enemy attacks in a style reminiscent of top-down shooters.
  • Original art and soundtrack brimming with personality.
  • Soulful, character-rich story with an emphasis on humor.
  • Created mostly by one person.
  • Become friends with all of the bosses!
  • At least 5 dogs.
  • You can date a skeleton.
  • Hmmm... now there are 6 dogs...?
  • Maybe you won't want to date the skeleton.
  • I thought I found a 7th dog, but it was actually just the 3rd dog.
  • If you play this game, can you count the dogs for me...? I'm not good at it.
game_info.description: You are a human who has fallen into the Underground, a world filled with monsters. Navigate through encounters with various monsters, but remember - you don't have to fight! Use the unique battle system to SPARE enemies by completing dialogue choices and dodging their attacks. Survive three monster encounters and escape to win. Each battle features timing-based dodging mechanics where you must avoid projectiles. Choose wisely: FIGHT deals damage, ACT opens mercy options, and SPARE lets enemies go when conditions are met.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move your SOUL (red heart) to dodge attacks in battle / Navigate menu options
Z Key: Confirm menu selection / Advance dialogue
Space: Quick dodge (short cooldown)
Enter: Start game from main menu
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Return to start screen from game over

TEST_1.test_description: Testing basic movement and menu navigation. Validates that the player can move during bullet patterns and select menu options using keyboard inputs.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move the SOUL in different directions during attack phases, cycle through menu options, and select various actions (FIGHT, ACT, SPARE) to test responsiveness.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player successfully navigates menus, dodges some attacks, and survives at least one turn. Position changes are validated and menu selections work correctly.

TEST_2.test_description: Testing the optimal win strategy by completing all three encounters through SPARE mechanics. This validates the mercy/pacifist route to victory.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Use ACT options to fulfill each monster's spare condition (compliment Froggit, joke with Whimsun, flex at Tsunderplane), dodge all attacks perfectly using calculated movements, then SPARE when hearts appear yellow.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully spare all three monsters without taking damage, reach GAME_OVER_WIN state, and validate that the pacifist route works as intended.

TEST_2.expected: Successfully spare all three monsters without taking damage, reach GAME_OVER_WIN state, and validate that the pacifist route works as intended.

TEST_3.test_description: Testing combat mechanics by defeating enemies through FIGHT. Validates the violent route and timing-based attack system.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Select FIGHT for each turn, time button presses correctly for maximum damage, dodge counterattacks, and defeat all monsters through combat.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Successfully defeat all three monsters using FIGHT actions, demonstrate timing mechanics work correctly, reach GAME_OVER_WIN through combat route.

TEST_4.test_description: Testing failure condition by intentionally taking damage until HP reaches zero. Validates game over mechanics and health system.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Do not dodge any attacks, let the SOUL collide with all projectiles, and verify HP decreases appropriately until reaching GAME_OVER_LOSE.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: HP gradually decreases from collisions, player dies when HP reaches 0, GAME_OVER_LOSE state is triggered with appropriate game over screen.

TEST_5.test_description: Testing mixed strategy gameplay combining FIGHT and ACT options. Validates that players can switch between aggressive and peaceful approaches.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Game handles mixed approaches correctly, spare conditions remain achievable after attacking, and all mechanics work together cohesively.
